{"id":775,"date":"2026-07-13T13:26:26","date_gmt":"2026-07-13T13:26:26","guid":{"rendered":"http:\/\/beesayatv.test\/?post_type=trail&p=775"},"modified":"2026-07-20T22:02:08","modified_gmt":"2026-07-20T22:02:08","slug":"incomplete-campagao-peak-area","status":"publish","type":"trail","link":"http:\/\/beesayatv.test\/trails\/incomplete-campagao-peak-area\/","title":{"rendered":"Incomplete\/ Campagao Peak Area"},"content":{"rendered":"\n

This trail is currently being explored. Only the verified section visited during the latest field exploration as shown on the Trail Atlas<\/a>.<\/p>\n\n\n\n

\n\n\n\n

Exploration date:<\/strong> July 2026
Objective:<\/strong> Verify the trail that loops around Campagao Peak based on a downloaded GPX.
Current extent:<\/strong> The current route extends to a pocket forest with a small residential settlement.
Exploration ended because:<\/strong> Despite asking several locals, the continuation of the trail could not be confirmed due to conflicting directions. A steep ascending trail showed signs of continuing uphill, but its destination and connection to the intended route remained uncertain. The exploration concluded by returning via the established Campagao Peak trail.<\/p>\n\n\n\n

Field Notes:<\/strong><\/p>\n\n\n\n

    \n
  • A possible continuation may be found by approaching the route from the opposite direction.<\/li>\n\n\n\n
  • Additional time will be required during a future field visit. Dense vegetation limits the usefulness of satellite imagery, as the footpaths are obscured by tree cover.<\/li>\n\n\n\n
  • The junction where this route branches from the Campagao Peak trail is faint and easy to overlook, giving the impression that it is rarely used. However, a short distance beyond the junction, the trail becomes well-defined.<\/li>\n\n\n\n
  • Another trail may provide direct access to the pocket forest (where the exploration ended) without using the Campagao Peak trail.<\/li>\n<\/ul>\n\n\n\n","protected":false},"featured_media":778,"template":"","trail_location":[64],"trail_feature":[],"trail_type":[],"trail_difficulty":[],"class_list":["post-775","trail","type-trail","status-publish","has-post-thumbnail","hentry","trail_location-minglanilla"],"_links":{"self":[{"href":"http:\/\/beesayatv.test\/wp-json\/wp\/v2\/trail\/775","targetHints":{"allow":["GET"]}}],"collection":[{"href":"http:\/\/beesayatv.test\/wp-json\/wp\/v2\/trail"}],"about":[{"href":"http:\/\/beesayatv.test\/wp-json\/wp\/v2\/types\/trail"}],"wp:featuredmedia":[{"embeddable":true,"href":"http:\/\/beesayatv.test\/wp-json\/wp\/v2\/media\/778"}],"wp:attachment":[{"href":"http:\/\/beesayatv.test\/wp-json\/wp\/v2\/media?parent=775"}],"wp:term":[{"taxonomy":"trail_location","embeddable":true,"href":"http:\/\/beesayatv.test\/wp-json\/wp\/v2\/trail_location?post=775"},{"taxonomy":"trail_feature","embeddable":true,"href":"http:\/\/beesayatv.test\/wp-json\/wp\/v2\/trail_feature?post=775"},{"taxonomy":"trail_type","embeddable":true,"href":"http:\/\/beesayatv.test\/wp-json\/wp\/v2\/trail_type?post=775"},{"taxonomy":"trail_difficulty","embeddable":true,"href":"http:\/\/beesayatv.test\/wp-json\/wp\/v2\/trail_difficulty?post=775"}],"curies":[{"name":"wp","href":"https:\/\/api.w.org\/{rel}","templated":true}]}}
